description: Direct acquisition of 80%. Above threshold, should trigger (Z 1)
legal_rationale: Z 1 (per-acquirer reading, Q1): 80% of all shares pass directly to a single new shareholder, >= 75% threshold met. Z 2 lit b sublit bb would equally be met, but Z 1 precedes ('Soweit eine Besteuerung nach Z 1 nicht in Betracht kommt').

description: Direct acquisition of 60%. Below threshold, should not trigger
legal_rationale: 60% < 75%: neither Z 1 (direct transfer) nor Z 2 (effective stake) reaches the 'mindestens 75%' threshold.

description: Direct acquisition of exactly 75%, at threshold, should trigger (Z 1)
legal_rationale: Z 1: 'mindestens 75%' is inclusive, so exactly 75.0% direct triggers.

description: Two-hop indirect chain, effective stake exactly 75% (100% x 75%), Z 2 triggered
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b: indirect Vereinigung via one chain; Schlussteil S1 multiplication 100% x 75% = 75% >= 75%.

description: Single acquirer holds two intermediate holdings each 100%, which together hold 75% of PropCo (50% + 25%), Z 2 triggered via summed indirect paths
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b: two parallel indirect paths (100x50 + 100x25) sum to 75% in one hand; per-level multiplication per Schlussteil S1, parallel paths additive (convention Q6).

description: Three-hop chain 100% x 100% x 80% = 80%, above threshold, Z 2 triggered
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b + Schlussteil S1: 100% x 100% x 80% = 80% >= 75%.

description: Two acquirers each hold 40% directly, neither alone reaches 75%, no group defined, not triggered
legal_rationale: No acquirer individually >= 75% (40/40) and no Erwerbergruppe defined (Z 4 input absent) -> no Z 2. An aggregate reading of Z 1 (80% to new shareholders in total) is deliberately not modeled (Q1).

description: Two acquirers, A1 holds 80% directly, Z 1 triggered by A1 alone
legal_rationale: A1 holds 80% direct >= 75% -> Z 1 (per-acquirer reading); A2's 10% is irrelevant.

description: Acquirer holds 74% directly and 10% indirectly via holding (100% x 10%), total effective 84%, Z 2 triggered
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b sublit aa: 74% direct + 10% indirect = 84% united in one hand (convention Q6: direct and indirect stakes add up); direct stake alone (74%) misses Z 1.

description: Three-level chain with two parallel holdings on middle level: A->H1 (100%)->PropCo (50%) and A->H2 (100%)->PropCo (30%). Effective: 50% + 30% = 80%, above threshold, Z 2 triggered
Four-hop deep chain 100% x 100% x 100% x 80% = 80%, deep nesting, Z 2 triggered
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b + Schlussteil S1 over four levels: product 80% >= 75%.

description: Acquirer group: A1 (40%) + A2 (40%) direct, grouped under einheitliche Leitung, group total 80% >= 75%, Z 2 triggered by group
legal_rationale: Z 2 + Z 4: no individual >= 75%, group members' stakes are summed: 40+40 = 80% >= 75% -> group liable ('sofern dies nicht gegeben ist, in der Hand einer Erwerbergruppe').

description: Three acquirers, A1+A2 in group (30%+30%=60%), A3 alone (20%), no threshold reached, not triggered
legal_rationale: Group sums to 60%, outsider holds 20%: nothing reaches 75%.

description: Acquirer group with indirect paths: A1->H->PropCo (100%x40%=40%) + A2->PropCo (40%), group total 80%, Z 2 triggered by group
legal_rationale: Group with an indirect member stake: 100x40 (A1, S1) + 40 (A2 direct) = 80% -> group liable under Z 2 + Z 4.

description: Single acquirer A1 reaches 80% alone via Z 2, group also defined but individual takes precedence over group
legal_rationale: A1 alone unites 80% (indirectly) -> the individual check precedes the group check (Z 2: '... eines Erwerbers oder, sofern dies nicht gegeben ist, ... Erwerbergruppe').

description: Acquirer group exactly at 75% threshold (A1 40% + A2 35%), Z 2 triggered by group
legal_rationale: Group sum exactly 75% ('mindestens 75%' inclusive) -> Z 2 triggered by the group.

description: Two separate groups, neither reaches 75%: G1 (A1 30% + A2 30% = 60%), G2 (A3 20% + A4 20% = 40%), not triggered
legal_rationale: Two groups at 60% and 40%: neither reaches 75%, no trigger.

description: Group with mixed direct+indirect: A1 (25% direct + 100%x20% indirect = 45%) + A2 (30% direct), group total 75%, Z 2 triggered by group
legal_rationale: Member-level mixed stakes: A1 25% direct + 100x20 indirect, A2 30% direct; group total exactly 75% -> triggered.

description: Direct acquisition of 100%, sole shareholder, should trigger (Z 1)
legal_rationale: Z 1: 100% of all shares pass directly to one new shareholder, >= 75%.

description: Relabeled copy of tc_003: direct acquisition of exactly 75% with renamed entities, must trigger identically
legal_rationale: Z 1: exactly 75% direct ('mindestens' inclusive). Outcome must be invariant under renaming of entity identifiers - the statute attaches consequences to share quotas, not names.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: renaming node ids/names must not change the outcome

description: Copy of tc_001 plus an additional 0% edge from a second acquirer; the 0% edge must be a no-op
legal_rationale: Z 1: A's 80% direct triggers exactly as in tc_001; B's 0% edge conveys no share in the Gesellschaftsvermoegen and is legally void of effect.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: adding a 0%-edge must not change the outcome

description: Five-hop chain 100%^4 x 75% = exactly 75%, deep nesting at the threshold, Z 2 triggered
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b + Schlussteil S1 across five levels: product exactly 75%, 'mindestens' inclusive.

description: Scaled copy of tc_008: terminal edge reduced 80% -> 60%, product 60% < 75%, must not trigger
legal_rationale: Schlussteil S1: 100 x 100 x 60 = 60% < 75%. Scaling a triggering structure below the threshold must remove the trigger.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: scaling the terminal stake below 75% must flip the outcome to not-triggered

description: Copy of tc_004 plus a 0% direct edge A->PropCo; outcome must be unchanged (75% indirect)
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b + S1: 100 x 75 = 75% as in tc_004; the added 0% direct edge conveys nothing.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: adding a 0%-edge must not change the outcome

description: Three parallel indirect paths 37.5% + 25% + 12.5% = exactly 75%, Z 2 triggered
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b: three fully-owned holdings hold 37.5/25/12.5 of PropCo; summed indirect stake exactly 75% (S1 + path additivity, Q6), 'mindestens' inclusive.

description: Two indirect paths 40% + 34.99% = 74.99%, just below threshold, should not trigger
legal_rationale: Summed indirect stake 74.99% < 75% (lower boundary probe for path summation).

description: Relabeled copy of tc_013: two parallel paths 50% + 30% = 80% with renamed entities, must trigger identically
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b: 100x50 + 100x30 = 80% >= 75%, as in tc_013; renaming entities must not matter.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: renaming node ids/names must not change the outcome

description: Mixed: 50% direct + 100%x25% indirect = exactly 75%, Z 2 triggered
legal_rationale: Z 2 lit b sublit aa: direct (50%) and indirect (25%) stakes of the same acquirer are united in one hand (Q6); total exactly 75%, inclusive threshold.

description: Scaled copy of tc_011: terminal stakes x0.75 (74->55.5 direct, 10->7.5 indirect), total 63% < 75%, must not trigger
legal_rationale: 55.5% + 7.5% = 63% < 75%. Scaling tc_011's triggering structure (84%) below the threshold must remove the trigger.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: scaling all terminal stakes below 75% total must flip the outcome

description: Two acquirers 74%/26%, no group: neither reaches 75%, should not trigger
legal_rationale: Largest individual stake 74% < 75%; no group defined -> no trigger (boundary probe; cf. Q1 on the unmodeled aggregate Z 1 reading).

description: Group includes the person exercising einheitliche Leitung (P, 12.5%) plus A1 (37.5%) and A2 (25%): 75% total, Z 2 triggered by group
legal_rationale: Z 4 S 2: the person exercising the einheitliche Leitung belongs to the Erwerbergruppe, so P's own 12.5% counts toward the group total: 37.5+25+12.5 = exactly 75% (convention Q8).

description: Relabeled copy of tc_016: 40% + 40% group with renamed entities, group id and member order changed, must trigger identically
legal_rationale: Z 2 + Z 4: group sum 80% >= 75% as in tc_016; identifiers and member ordering are legally irrelevant.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: renaming ids/group ids and reordering members must not change the outcome

description: Group 40% + 34% = 74% with a 26% outsider, nothing reaches 75%, should not trigger
legal_rationale: Group sum 74% < 75%; the outsider's 26% must not be attributed to the group (Z 4: only members under the einheitliche Leitung count).

description: Group with a deep member chain: A1 100%x100%x45% + A2 100%x35% = 80%, Z 2 triggered by group
legal_rationale: Member stakes per S1 (A1: 45% via two levels; A2: 35%) sum to 80% >= 75% -> group liable.

description: Scaled copy of tc_019: terminal stakes x0.8 (40->32 each), group total 64% < 75%, must not trigger
legal_rationale: 32% + 32% = 64% < 75%. Scaling tc_019's triggering group structure (80%) below the threshold must remove the trigger.

metamorphic_relation.invariant: scaling all terminal stakes below 75% total must flip the outcome

description: Copy of tc_016 plus a 0% indirect path (A1->H 100%, H->PropCo 0%); group outcome must be unchanged
legal_rationale: Z 2 + Z 4: group sum still 40+40 = 80%; the 0% path contributes nothing (S1: x x 0 = 0).

metamorphic_relation.invariant: adding a 0%-path must not change the outcome

description: Acquirer chain: A1 owns 100% of A2 (also an acquirer); A2 holds 80% of PropCo directly. Direct acquisition (A2) precedes indirect (A1): taxpayer A2
legal_rationale: Schlussteil S2: 'Erfuellt derselbe Vorgang die Voraussetzungen fuer einen unmittelbaren und mittelbaren Erwerbsvorgang, geht der unmittelbare Erwerbsvorgang vor.' A2's direct 80% precedes A1's indirect 80% (100x80, S1). Reading to be confirmed by law professor (Q3/Q4).

description: Group defined, but A1 alone holds exactly 75% directly: individual (Z 1) precedes group, taxpayer A1
legal_rationale: Z 1 at the inclusive threshold; group membership does not displace the individual trigger (Z 2 group check is subsidiary: 'sofern dies nicht gegeben ist').

description: Group fallback ordering: A1 50% and A2 30%, no individual >= 75%, group sum 80% -> taxpayer G1
legal_rationale: Z 2: the group is examined only because no single acquirer qualifies ('sofern dies nicht gegeben ist'); 50+30 = 80% >= 75% -> group liable.

description: A holds exactly 75% directly plus 10% indirectly (85% total): direct stake alone satisfies Z 1, taxpayer A
legal_rationale: Z 1 met by the direct 75% alone; per Schlussteil S2 the direct acquisition takes precedence, the additional indirect 10% (S1) does not change the liable party.
